Terms of UserPrivacy PolicyMAX Cleaner respects and protects the personal privacy of all users who use the service. In order to provide you with more accurate and personalized services, MAX will use and disclose your personal information in accordance with the provisions of this Privacy Policy. However, we will treat your information with a high degree of diligence and prudence.

Except as otherwise provided in this Privacy Policy, we will not disclose or provide your information to third parties without your prior permission. When you read this Privacy Policy and start using it, you are deemed to have agreed to the entire content of this Privacy Policy.

Scope of ApplicationWhen you use this application, this application will automatically receive and record the information on your device, including but not limited to your IP address, language used, date and time, software and hardware feature information, and your device information and other data ;

Information UseThis application will not provide, sell, rent, share or trade your personal information to any unrelated third party, unless you have obtained your permission in advance, or the third party and MAX provide services for you individually or jointly, and after the service ends After that, it will be prohibited from accessing all such materials, including those that it had previously been able to access.

MAX  also does not allow any third party to collect, edit, sell or distribute your personal information by any means. If any user of this application platform engages in the above activities, once discovered, this application has the right to immediately terminate the service agreement with the user.

Information DisclosureIn the following cases, this application will disclose your personal information in whole or in part according to your personal wishes or the provisions of the law:a, disclosed to third parties with your prior consent;b. In order to provide the products and services you have requested, you must share your personal information with third parties;

c. Disclosure to third parties or administrative or judicial institutions in accordance with relevant provisions of the law or the requirements of administrative or judicial institutions;d. If you violate relevant local laws, regulations or this application service agreement or related rules, you need to disclose it to a third party;

e. If you are a qualified intellectual property complainant and have filed a complaint, you should disclose it to the respondent at the request of the respondent, so that both parties can deal with possible rights disputes;f. In a transaction created on this application platform, if any party to the transaction fulfills or partially fulfills the transaction obligations and requests for information disclosure, this application has the right to decide to provide the user with the necessary information such as the contact information of the counterparty. , to facilitate the completion of a transaction or the resolution of a dispute.
g, other disclosures that this application deems appropriate in accordance with laws, regulations or website policies.

Information Storage and ExchangeThe information and data about you collected by MAX  will be stored on our server, and this information and data may be transmitted to your country, region or outside the location where the application collects the information and data and accessed, stored and displayed abroad.

Use of CookiesIf you do not refuse to accept cookies, MAX  will set or access cookies on your device so that you can log in or use the services or functions of this application platform that rely on cookies. This application uses cookies to provide you with more thoughtful and personalized services, including promotional services.

You have the right to choose to accept or reject cookies, but if you choose to reject cookies, you may not be able to log in or use the web services or functions of this app that rely on cookies. This policy will apply to the information obtained through the set cookies.

Information SecurityWe are committed to protecting your information by implementing industry standard security measures designed to prevent the loss, misuse and alteration of the user information we collect. However, data transmission over the Internet is not 100% secure. Therefore, we cannot guarantee or warrant the security of any information you transmit on or through the Services, and you do so at your own risk.
Use of Third Party Advertisers

We use third-party advertising companies to serve ads and collect information when you use MAX . These companies may collect and use information about your visits to this and other websites in order to provide advertisements on our website, other websites and other forms of media (such as mobile applications) about goods and services that may be of interest to you , and to understand how users react to advertisements on our site and other sites. These companies may use technologies such as cookies and pixels to collect this information. Some of these web beacons may be placed by third-party service providers to help determine the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns or email communications. These service providers may use these web beacons to place persistent cookies on your computer.

This enables service providers to recognize your computer each time you visit certain pages or emails, and to compile anonymous information about those page views, which in turn enables us and our service providers to understand which advertisements and emails take you to our website and how you use it. In addition to your web searches while visiting this website and your web surfing behavior on this website and other websites you may visit, this information is used to show you on other websites and other forms of media based on your Interest-tailored advertising.
